overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a narrow dirt trail surrounded by tall grass. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight beam, revealing dense vegetation on both sides and occasional views of a bright celestial light in the dark sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, surrounded by tall grass and dense vegetation. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. Around the 3-second mark, a bright celestial light becomes visible in the upper left sky, adding subtle illumination to the scene.

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the grass-lined trail with the bright celestial light visible in the upper left sky. Around 7.5 seconds, the light disappears from view as the camera angle shifts or the light passes behind vegetation, returning the scene to flashlight-only illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark wilderness trail where a brief celestial encounter punctuates the solitude of the night. It begins with a steady walk down a narrow dirt path, where a warm flashlight beam cuts through the surrounding tall grass and dense vegetation. As the camera advances, a bright celestial light emerges in the upper left sky, casting a subtle glow over the natural landscape. The scene then continues along the grass-lined trail with the light remaining visible, before the camera angle shifts and the glow vanishes behind the vegetation. Finally, the environment returns to the singular, focused illumination of the flashlight as the walk persists into the darkness.
